samples.xml_description:
<module id="adder_32bit">
    <description>Implement a module of a carry-lookahead 32-bit adder that uses the Carry-Lookahead Adder (CLA) architecture.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="S" width_description="[32:1]">32-bit output representing the sum of A and B.</output>
        <output id="C32">Carry-out output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="N">32</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    The adder_32bit module takes two 32-bit inputs, A and B, and produces a 32-bit sum output S and a carry-out output C32.
    The module implements a carry-lookahead adder architecture, which efficiently computes the sum of A and B by breaking the operation into smaller 16-bit sections.
    The adder_32bit module consists of multiple instances of a 16-bit CLA block, which handles the addition of 16-bit portions of A and B and generates the corresponding sum and carry outputs.
    </implementation>
</module>
